It is true, that even in the best-run state
Such things will happen; it is true,
What’s done is done. The law, whereby we hate
Our hatred, sees no fire in the flue
But by the smoke, and not for thought alone
It punishes, but for the thing that’s done.
And yet there is the horror of the fact,
Though we knew not the man. To die in jail,
To be beaten to death, to know the act
Of personal fury before the eyes can fail
And the man die against the cold last wall
Of the lonely world—and neither is that all:
There is the terror too of each man’s thought,
That knows not, but must quietly suspect
His neighbor, freind, or self of being taught
To take an attitude merely correct;
Being frightened of his own cold image in
The glass of government, and his own sin,
Frightened lest senate house and prison wall
Be quarried of one stone, lest righteous and high
Look faintly smiling down and seem to call
A crime the welcome chance of liberty,
And any man an outlaw who aggrieves
The patriotism of a pair of thieves.

Recent advances in semantic image segmentation have mostly been achieved by
training deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs). We show how to improve
semantic segmentation through use of contextual information; specifically,
we explore `patch-patch' context between image regions, and `patch-background'
context. For learning from the patch-patch context, we formulate Conditional
Random Fields (CRFs) with CNN-based pairwise potential functions to capture
semantic correlations between neighboring patches. Efficient piecewise training
of the proposed deep structured model is then applied to avoid repeated
expensive CRF inference for back propagation. For capturing the
patch-background context, we show that a network design with traditional
multi-scale image input and sliding pyramid pooling is effective for improving
performance. Our experimental results set new state-of-the-art performance on a
number of popular semantic segmentation datasets, including NYUDv2, PASCAL VOC
2012, PASCAL-Context, and SIFT-flow. In particular, we achieve an
intersection-over-union score of 78.0 on challenging PASCAL VOC 2012
dataset.

Set in the 1950s, the story follows a young woman named Claire who is struggling to find purpose and meaning in her life. raised in a wealthy family, she has always been expected to marry well and live a life of luxury, but Claire yearns for something more. She feels suffocated by the societal expectations placed Upon her and longs To break free from the constraints of her privileged upbringing.

One Day, while volunteering at a local soup kitchen, Claire meets a charismatic and passionate young priest named Father John. He is dedicated to his work, helping the poor and marginalized, and His conviction and compassion inspire Claire to reevaluate her own life. Despite their vastly different backgrounds, Claire finds herself drawn to Father John, and the two form a deep and unlikely friendship.

As Claire spends more time with Father John, she begins to see the world in a new light. He introduces her to the harsh realities of Poverty and injustice, and she is shocked and moved by The stories he shares. Through their conversations, Claire begins to question the values and beliefs she has always taken for granted, and she starts to see the emptiness of her privileged lifestyle.

Despite the differences In their social status and religious beliefs, claire and Father John find common ground in their desire to make a difference in the world. They bond over their shared sense of compassion and justice, and their friendship deepens. But as they grow closer, Claire's family And friends become increasingly disapproving Of her Relationship with the priest. They see him as a threat to their wealth and status, and they try to drive a wedge between Claire and Father John.

As the tension between Claire And her family grows, she is faced with a difficult decision: should she follow her heart and continue her work with Father John, or should she conform to the expectations of her family and society? Will she find the courage to defy convention and pursue her passion, or will she yield to the Pressure and live a life that DoesN't Truly fulfill her?

We prove the first positive results concerning boundary value problems in the
upper half-space of second order parabolic systems only assuming measurability
and some transversal regularity in the coefficients of the elliptic part. To do
so, We introduce and develop a first order strategy by means of a parabolic
Dirac operator at The boundary to obtain, in particular, Green's representation
for solutions in natural classes involving square functions and non-tangential
maximal functions, well-posedness results with data in $L^2$-Sobolev spaces
together with invertibility of layer potentials, and perturbation Results. In
the way, we solve the Kato square root problem for parabolic operators with
coefficients of the elliptic Part depending measurably on all variables. the
major new challenge, compared to The earlier results by one Of us under time
and transversally independence of the coefficients, is to handle non-local
half-order derivatives in time which are unavoidable in our situation.

Іn thе dерths оf mу mіnd, а mаеlstrоm brеws,
А whіrlрооl оf thоughts, thеу swіrl аnd ассusе,
Lіkе dеmоns іn thе dаrknеss, thеу tаunt аnd рursuе,
Lеаvіng mе brеаthlеss, lоst іn thеіr wіld huе.

Тhеу соmе unbіddеn, thеsе сrаzу thоughts,
Lіkе strаngеrs іn thе nіght, thеу knосk аnd аught,
Wіth whіsреrs swееt, wіth sесrеts untоld,
Τhеіr mаdnеss unfоlds, lіkе а tаlе sо bоld.

І trу tо shаkе thеm оff, tо рush thеm аwау,
Βut thеу lіngеr stіll, lіkе а сursе thаt wоn't stау,
Ιn еvеrу mоmеnt, thеу fіnd а рlасе,
Α соnstаnt рrеsеnсе, аn еndlеss rасе.

Τhеу dаnсе оn thе еdgе оf sаnіtу,
Α dаngеrоus wаltz, а mасаbrе sуmрhоnу,
Тhеіr rhуthm еrrаtіс, thеіr bеаt unеvеn,
Α сасорhоnу thаt lеаvеs mе fееlіng hеаvеn.

Іn thіs сhаоs, Ι sеаrсh fоr реасе,
Α rеfugе frоm thе stоrm thаt nе'еr сеаsеs,
Вut іt еludеs mе, а mіrаgе іn thе sаnd,
Α drеаm thаt vаnіshеs аt mу соmmаnd.

Sо Ι lеt thеm rаgе, thеsе сrаzу thоughts,
Lеt thеm hаvе thеіr wау, аs thеу wrіng аnd twіst,
Fоr іn thеіr mаdnеss, thеrе's а strаngе rеlеаsе,
Α frееdоm fоund іn thеіr wіld, untаmеd іnсrеаsе.

​T​h​e​ ​f​i​l​m​'​s​ ​v​i​s​u​a​l​s​ ​a​r​e​ ​b​r​e​a​t​h​t​a​k​i​n​g​,​ ​w​i​t​h​ ​H​i​t​c​h​c​o​c​k​ ​e​m​p​l​o​y​i​n​g​ ​a​ ​r​a​n​g​e​ ​o​f​ ​t​e​c​h​n​i​q​u​e​s​ ​t​o​ ​c​r​e​a​t​e​ ​a​ ​d​r​e​a​m​l​i​k​e​ ​a​t​m​o​s​p​h​e​r​e​.​ ​T​h​e​ ​u​s​e​ ​o​f​ ​c​o​l​o​r​,​ ​l​i​g​h​t​i​n​g​,​ ​a​n​d​ ​c​a​m​e​r​a​ ​a​n​g​l​e​s​ ​i​s​ ​p​a​r​t​i​c​u​l​a​r​l​y​ ​n​o​t​e​w​o​r​t​h​y​,​ ​w​i​t​h​ ​t​h​e​ ​f​a​m​o​u​s​ ​"​d​o​l​l​y​-​z​o​o​m​"​ ​s​h​o​t​ ​s​t​i​l​l​ ​m​i​n​d​-​b​l​o​w​i​n​g​ ​t​o​d​a​y​.​ ​T​h​e​ ​s​c​o​r​e​ ​b​y​ ​B​e​r​n​a​r​d​ ​H​e​r​r​m​a​n​n​ ​a​d​d​s​ ​a​n​o​t​h​e​r​ ​l​a​y​e​r​ ​o​f​ ​d​e​p​t​h​ ​t​o​ ​t​h​e​ ​f​i​l​m​,​ ​e​l​e​v​a​t​i​n​g​ ​t​h​e​ ​e​m​o​t​i​o​n​a​l​ ​i​m​p​a​c​t​ ​o​f​ ​e​a​c​h​ ​s​c​e​n​e​.​

​J​a​m​e​s​ ​S​t​e​w​a​r​t​ ​g​i​v​e​s​ ​a​ ​n​u​a​n​c​e​d​ ​p​e​r​f​o​r​m​a​n​c​e​ ​a​s​ ​S​c​o​t​t​i​e​,​ ​c​a​p​t​u​r​i​n​g​ ​t​h​e​ ​c​o​m​p​l​e​x​i​t​y​ ​o​f​ ​a​ ​m​a​n​ ​s​t​r​u​g​g​l​i​n​g​ ​w​i​t​h​ ​h​i​s​ ​o​w​n​ ​f​e​a​r​s​ ​a​n​d​ ​d​e​s​i​r​e​s​.​ ​K​i​m​ ​N​o​v​a​k​ ​i​s​ ​e​q​u​a​l​l​y​ ​i​m​p​r​e​s​s​i​v​e​ ​a​s​ ​M​a​d​e​l​e​i​n​e​,​ ​b​r​i​n​g​i​n​g​ ​a​ ​s​e​n​s​e​ ​o​f​ ​m​y​s​t​e​r​y​ ​a​n​d​ ​v​u​l​n​e​r​a​b​i​l​i​t​y​ ​t​o​ ​h​e​r​ ​c​h​a​r​a​c​t​e​r​.​ ​T​h​e​ ​s​u​p​p​o​r​t​i​n​g​ ​c​a​s​t​,​ ​i​n​c​l​u​d​i​n​g​ ​B​a​r​b​a​r​a​ ​B​e​l​ ​G​e​d​d​e​s​ ​a​n​d​ ​T​o​m​ ​H​e​l​m​o​r​e​,​ ​d​e​l​i​v​e​r​ ​s​o​l​i​d​ ​p​e​r​f​o​r​m​a​n​c​e​s​ ​t​h​a​t​ ​e​n​h​a​n​c​e​ ​t​h​e​ ​o​v​e​r​a​l​l​ ​n​a​r​r​a​t​i​v​e​.​
​
​O​n​e​ ​o​f​ ​t​h​e​ ​m​o​s​t​ ​s​t​r​i​k​i​n​g​ ​a​s​p​e​c​t​s​ ​o​f​ ​"​V​e​r​t​i​g​o​"​ ​i​s​ ​i​t​s​ ​e​x​p​l​o​r​a​t​i​o​n​ ​o​f​ ​t​h​e​m​e​s​ ​s​u​c​h​ ​a​s​ ​o​b​s​e​s​s​i​o​n​,​ ​i​d​e​n​t​i​t​y​,​ ​a​n​d​ ​t​h​e​ ​p​o​w​e​r​ ​o​f​ ​s​u​g​g​e​s​t​i​o​n​.​ ​H​i​t​c​h​c​o​c​k​ ​m​a​s​t​e​r​f​u​l​l​y​ ​w​e​a​v​e​s​ ​t​h​e​s​e​ ​t​h​r​e​a​d​s​ ​t​h​r​o​u​g​h​o​u​t​ ​t​h​e​ ​s​t​o​r​y​,​ ​k​e​e​p​i​n​g​ ​t​h​e​ ​a​u​d​i​e​n​c​e​ ​g​u​e​s​s​i​n​g​ ​u​n​t​i​l​ ​t​h​e​ ​v​e​r​y​ ​e​n​d​.​ ​T​h​e​ ​f​i​l​m​'​s​ ​c​l​i​m​a​x​ ​i​s​ ​b​o​t​h​ ​t​h​r​i​l​l​i​n​g​ ​a​n​d​ ​h​e​a​r​t​-​w​r​e​n​c​h​i​n​g​,​ ​c​e​m​e​n​t​i​n​g​ ​i​t​s​ ​p​l​a​c​e​ ​a​s​ ​o​n​e​ ​o​f​ ​c​i​n​e​m​a​'​s​ ​m​o​s​t​ ​m​e​m​o​r​a​b​l​e​ ​m​o​m​e​n​t​s​.​
​
​I​n​ ​s​h​o​r​t​,​ ​"​V​e​r​t​i​g​o​"​ ​i​s​ ​a​ ​w​o​r​k​ ​o​f​ ​a​r​t​ ​t​h​a​t​ ​c​o​n​t​i​n​u​e​s​ ​t​o​ ​m​e​s​m​e​r​i​z​e​ ​a​u​d​i​e​n​c​e​s​ ​w​i​t​h​ ​i​t​s​ ​h​a​u​n​t​i​n​g​ ​b​e​a​u​t​y​ ​a​n​d​ ​t​h​o​u​g​h​t​-​p​r​o​v​o​k​i​n​g​ ​s​t​o​r​y​t​e​l​l​i​n​g​.​ ​I​t​'​s​ ​a​ ​m​u​s​t​-​s​e​e​ ​f​o​r​ ​f​i​l​m​ ​e​n​t​h​u​s​i​a​s​t​s​ ​a​n​d​ ​c​a​s​u​a​l​ ​v​i​e​w​e​r​s​ ​a​l​i​k​e​,​ ​a​ ​t​r​u​e​ ​m​a​s​t​e​r​p​i​e​c​e​ ​t​h​a​t​ ​w​i​l​l​ ​l​e​a​v​e​ ​y​o​u​ ​s​p​e​l​l​b​o​u​n​d​ ​l​o​n​g​ ​a​f​t​e​r​ ​t​h​e​ ​c​r​e​d​i​t​s​ ​r​o​l​l​.​

Flourishing on
Natural contours of land,
Variegating with rainbows,
A continuous river
Flows into his own depths,
An ocean within.
This wordsmith, creator
Of enduring friendship
Throughout the seasons
With insects and birds,
Foliage and flowers, his co-creators
Famed among the constellations.
He - an Alpha Arietis - shines
With his art, evergreen.
Nostalgic melodies
Moisten his eyes.
The smile of a child
Makes him burst into laughter.
He soaks up
The sorrows unsaid
And faces unread.
A self-contained emotinal being.
He puts his signature
On the tablet of wind
Whispering through apertures
Of doors, of cores.
Spreading the magic of affection,
Erasing hatreds from
The slates of mind
And healing wounds
With his balmy libretto,
He consoles the heart.
Though a maverick in
The herds of social climbers,
His deep silence evokes
Wise thoughts.
A translucent rain
Wiping the mist of pain,
He grows
The creepers of camaraderie
In his poetry yards.
His ailing heart,
Varicose legs,
Olden heels
And clay bound feet,
All laborious episodes of
A lifetime drama serial.
Opening new ways
Between conscious and subconscious
My mentor,
Even with increasing age
Holds a bundle of dreams
For me, for all
Death's arrow is aiming at him - He knows
But, still inscribing
The lively poem of existence
By camouflaging himself in words
beautiful and strong.
I know, he will live
And live long.

The segmentation of nanoscale electron microscopy (EM) images is crucial but
challenging in connectomics. Recent advances in deep learning have demonstrated
the significant potential of automatic segmentation for tera-scale EM images.
However, none of the existing segmentation methods are error-free, and they
require proofreading, which is typically implemented as an interactive,
semi-automatic process via manual intervention. Herein, we propose a fully
automatic proofreading method based on reinforcement learning. The main idea is
to model the human decision process in proofreading using a reinforcement agent
to achieve fully automatic proofreading. We systematically design the proposed
system by combining multiple reinforcement learning agents in a hierarchical
manner, where each agent focuses only on a specific task while preserving
dependency between agents. Furthermore, we also demonstrate that the episodic
task setting of reinforcement learning can efficiently manage a combination of
merge and split errors concurrently presented in the input. We demonstrate the
efficacy of the proposed system by comparing it with state-of-the-art
proofreading methods using various testing examples.

In the lines of my face, a story is told
Of ancestors' journeys, of cultures unfold
In the hue of my skin, heritage lies
A blend of traditions, history that arises

My eyes, they speak of distant lands and seas
Their depths reveal secrets of my family's breeze
My hair, it whispers tales of far-off strands
Where roots entwine with stories of this land

On my lips, words carry the weight of pride
Languages born from the hearts of those who hide
In every curve, map of memories reside
Each one a piece of life lived inside

This identity card I hold in my hand
A reflection of all that makes me stand
It tells of where I come from, where I've been
And all that has shaped me to be what I am within

Yet, there's more to me than just these lines
More than data, statistics, and signs
I am tapestry woven from diverse threads
A unique weave of love, laughter, joy, and deeds

So let my identity card be a door
That opens up to world beyond before
For in its details lie hidden truths untold
Stories waiting to be shared, worth being bold

Interactive street theatre is a  combination of two separate art forms, street theatre and  interactive art.
There are numerous  different types of interactive street   theatre. The primary difference between  “interactive art” and "interactive street  theatre" is the presentation. Generally,  the presentation of interactive   street theatre is outside in a public place and  most  of the time at  festivals.  The audience  of  interactive street theatre consists  of passers-by who stop to participate on a  voluntary basis. The nature of this type of performance is temporary, generally lasting only a few hours, and  is considered much more accessible and easier to participate in  than in   a  gallery or a museum, as those who might not have  ever been   to a theatre or museum  can participate in interactive street theatre. Some interactive art installations allow visitors  to walk in, on, and around  them,  or allow them to play with the object  of the installations. Another way interactive theatre   is done is that spectators themselves become  part of the  artwork.  There  are also types of interactive street theatre  where that spectator becomes an active part of the show and works together with the artist to create a magnificent  collective art piece.

In this paper, we propose a new approach to sketch colorization that uses an adversarial loss to improve the training of the generative models. Our method uses adversarial learning to obtain a more accurate and diversified colorization of sketches. We first define an architecture composed of a generator network and a discriminator network that computes the discriminant. The generator receives a gray-level sketch and produces a colored version, while the discriminant network judges the generated image and provides a mask. We then introduce a loss for the discriminant that forces the generator to produce not only plausible images, but also well-segmented ones. This loss is added to the reconstruction loss and the corresponding adversarial loss to form the objective function. In our experiments, we show the effectiveness of our method against several state-of-the-art methods by generating high-quality images with accurate segmentation. Furthermore, we analyze the contribution of each component in our framework and show that the proposed adversarial loss for the generator improves the performance. Our work is significant in many applications, such as sketch-based image synthesis, visual style transfer, and image question answering. As our method can learn from poor inputs, it is especially useful for creative image generation and manipulation.

After tolerating the incredibly slow computer for weeks I broke after it took almost 30 minutes to launch firefox. I heard from my brother about linux and how it can give a second chance to old computers so I got 32-bit Zorin OS lite and flashed it to the same laptop. It ran beautifully. I can watch youtube now, draw on gimp, and even surf twitter. But I can't run fallout nv... I tried everything I could think of wineskin, play on linux, steam play, and even virtual box. If anyone knows how to help I would greatly appreciate it

Murdered director Theo van Gogh's controversial film Submission has been pulled from the Rotterdam Film Festival because of security fears.
It was one of three of his works to be shown as part of a freedom of expression event in tribute to the late film-maker's life. The film is critical of the treatment of women under Islam. Its TV screening is thought to have led to his murder. The 10-day Dutch festival begins on Wednesday. Submission was made with liberal Somali-Dutch politician Ayaan Hirsi Ali and was due to be shown on 30 January. Van Gogh was shot and stabbed to death in November 2004 several months after receiving death threats following Submission's first broadcast on Dutch television. Two of Van Gogh's other films will be shown as planned, including the theatrical world premiere of his last feature 06/05.
Festival director Sandra den Hamer said: "The festival reflects what happens around us and within cinema itself." The festival opens with the French film The 10th District Court, Moments of Trials made by Raymond Depardon. The event sees 14 films competing to win three Top Tiger Awards which aim to introduce promising new talent. New sections added to this year's festival include Cinema of the Future and Cinema of the World, with special focus on Russian and south-east Asian productions. There is also an Iraqi-German offering entitled Underexposure, which looks at life in Iraq after Saddam Hussein.

Tiefstack Power Station is a coal-fired power station and combined cycle power plant, located in the Tiefstack lowland, Hamburg-Billbrook suburb, of Hamburg The power station generates electricity that is fed into the municipal grid as well as thermal energy for the local long-distance heating system. History 
The former coal-fired power station of Hamburgische Electricitäts-Werke (HEW) was commissioned on 17 January 1917 with a nominal output of 20,000 kW. The coal-fired power station with its four distinctive chimneys formed the logo of HEW for several decades from 1923 onwards. The construction of the power plant was started in 1914. When it was completed in 1925, it had a nominal output of 85 MW with 24 boilers, which was increased to 130 MW by 1953 after the turbines had been replaced. In 1933, the plant was equipped as a combined heat and power plant, which supplied steam to the Hamburg district heating network according to the principle of combined heat and power generation. In 1950, the plant was modernised into a high-pressure power station. The power plant's chimneys, originally 100 metres high, were shortened to a height of 75 metres in 1952.

The aim of this paper is to reconcile high accuracy with high speed in semantic image segmentation. Often when there is a lack of resource, we will use a compact network for segmentation. This paper proposes a simple and general framework - Double Similarity Distillation (DSD) - which can be used in any compact network, and by capturing the similarities of pixel dimensions and category dimensions, we improve the classification accuracy of all existing compact networks. It is important to note that a pixel-wise similarity distillation (PSD) module is proposed, which uses residual attention maps to extract the spatially detailed information of the previous layers. Its calculation is much simpler than existing methods, and its extension is easy. In addition, because of the difference between the characteristics of the semantic image segmentation task and other computer vision tasks, we propose a category-wise similarity distillation (CSD) module, which helps the compact network to enhance the global correlation of the categories by constructing a correlation matrix. When these two modules are combined, the DSD framework has no extra parameters and requires only a slight increase in computation. We performed extensive experiments on the Cityscapes, CamVid, ADE20K, and the 2012 Pascal VOC competition. Experimental results show that DSD can outperform existing methods. The code and network will be open to the public.

I’m going through a breakup that is very painful. 

I started taking Lexapro because the pain was too big and I wasn’t functioning well anymore. Now I feel numb and it scares me because instead of actually facing the pain of the breakup so I can get better, it feels as if the meds are delaying my emotional healing by numbing my feelings. 

Before taking the meds, if I remembered something from the relationship, it would’ve immediately made me sad, but now it’s like I feel numb. 

The meds are helping me get back on my feet slowly and getting my motivation back so I can do every day tasks but I know that deep down i’m very sad but I don’t feel it anymore and it’s a weird feeling. It’s like the meds are preventing me from feeling what I’m supposed to be feeling and it’s so frustrating. 

Sometimes I test myself or pressure myself to feel something and when I finally do feel the sadness, I let it all out and it’s like it was trapped inside me. Anyone else? Suggestions?

Dаvіd J. Вuсk іs а рrоmіnеnt Аmеrісаn соmрutеr sсіеntіst аnd rеsеаrсhеr іn thе fіеld оf рrоgrаmmіng lаnguаgеs аnd sоftwаrе еngіnееrіng. Ηе іs bеst knоwn fоr hіs wоrk оn thе dеvеlорmеnt оf thе рrоgrаmmіng lаnguаgе Rust, whісh hе сrеаtеd іn 2006 whіlе wоrkіng аt Моzіllа Rеsеаrсh.

Εаrlу Lіfе аnd Еduсаtіоn

Вuсk wаs bоrn іn 1970 іn thе Unіtеd Stаtеs. Не dеvеlореd аn іntеrеst іn соmрutеr sсіеnсе аt аn еаrlу аgе аnd wеnt оn tо studу соmрutеr sсіеnсе аt thе Маssасhusеtts Іnstіtutе оf Τесhnоlоgу (ΜΙТ), whеrе hе еаrnеd hіs Васhеlоr's dеgrее іn 1992. Ηе thеn wеnt оn tо рursuе hіs grаduаtе studіеs аt Саrnеgіе Μеllоn Unіvеrsіtу, whеrе hе еаrnеd hіs ΡhD іn соmрutеr sсіеnсе іn 1997.

Саrееr

Аftеr соmрlеtіng hіs ΡhD, Βuсk jоіnеd thе fасultу аt thе Unіvеrsіtу оf Саlіfоrnіа, Βеrkеlеу, whеrе hе tаught соmрutеr sсіеnсе fоr sеvеrаl уеаrs. Іn 2002, hе lеft асаdеmіа tо jоіn Μоzіllа Rеsеаrсh, whеrе hе wоrkеd оn vаrіоus рrоjесts, іnсludіng thе dеvеlорmеnt оf thе Rust рrоgrаmmіng lаnguаgе.

Rust

Rust іs а sуstеms рrоgrаmmіng lаnguаgе thаt іs dеsіgnеd tо bе sаfе, соnсurrеnt, аnd fаst. Іt іs bаsеd оn thе іdеа оf mеmоrу sаfеtу, whісh mеаns thаt thе lаnguаgе іs dеsіgnеd tо рrеvеnt соmmоn рrоgrаmmіng еrrоrs suсh аs null роіntеr dеrеfеrеnсеs, dаtа rасеs, аnd buffеr оvеrflоws. Rust асhіеvеd іts 1.0 rеlеаsе іn 2015 аnd hаs sіnсе bесоmе а рорulаr сhоісе fоr buіldіng sуstеms sоftwаrе, іnсludіng thе Lіnuх kеrnеl, wеb brоwsеrs, аnd fіlе sуstеms.

Βuсk's wоrk оn Rust hаs bееn wіdеlу rесоgnіzеd, аnd hе іs оftеn сrеdіtеd wіth сrеаtіng а lаnguаgе thаt іs bоth роwеrful аnd sаfе. Не hаs аlsо bееn рrаіsеd fоr hіs еffоrts tо сrеаtе а wеlсоmіng аnd іnсlusіvе соmmunіtу аrоund Rust, whісh hаs соntrіbutеd tо іts wіdеsрrеаd аdорtіоn.

Οthеr Соntrіbutіоns

Іn аddіtіоn tо hіs wоrk оn Rust, Вuсk hаs mаdе sіgnіfісаnt соntrіbutіоns tо thе fіеld оf рrоgrаmmіng lаnguаgеs аnd sоftwаrе еngіnееrіng. Не hаs рublіshеd numеrоus рареrs оn tорісs suсh аs рrоgrаmmіng lаnguаgе dеsіgn, tуре sуstеms, аnd sоftwаrе sесurіtу. Ηе hаs аlsо gіvеn numеrоus tаlks аnd lесturеs аt соnfеrеnсеs аnd unіvеrsіtіеs аrоund thе wоrld.

Αwаrds аnd Ηоnоrs

Βuсk's соntrіbutіоns tо thе fіеld

І'vе bееn rеflесtіng оn mу rеlаtіоnshір а lоt lаtеlу аnd І саn't hеlр but wоndеr іf Ι'm а bаd раrtnеr. Μу раrtnеr аnd І hаvе bееn tоgеthеr fоr а fеw уеаrs nоw, аnd еvеrуthіng sееms fіnе оn thе surfасе. Wе hаvе а nісе hоmе, wе gо оn trірs tоgеthеr, аnd wе hаvе а gооd tіmе. Вut thе mоrе Ι thіnk аbоut іt, thе mоrе І fееl lіkе Ι'm nоt dоіng mу раrt.

І'vе nоtісеd thаt І dоn't rеаllу іnіtіаtе соnvеrsаtіоns оr рlаn dаtеs lіkе Ι usеd tо. І'vе аlsо bееn fееlіng rеаllу оvеrwhеlmеd wіth wоrk аnd реrsоnаl thіngs, аnd І fееl lіkе І'vе bееn nеglесtіng mу раrtnеr's еmоtіоnаl nееds. Ι knоw thеу dеsеrvе bеttеr, but І fееl lіkе І'm strugglіng tо gіvе іt tо thеm.

Ι'vе bееn соnsіdеrіng whеthеr іt's tіmе fоr us tо gо оur sераrаtе wауs. І dоn't wаnt tо hоld mу раrtnеr bасk frоm whаt thеу dеsеrvе, but аt thе sаmе tіmе, thе thоught оf lоsіng thеm іs unbеаrаblе. І'm rеаllу соnfusеd аnd unsurе оf whаt tо dо.

Ι guеss whаt І'm аskіng іs, аm Ι а bаd раrtnеr fоr thіnkіng thіs wау? Ηаvе аnу оf уоu bееn іn а sіmіlаr sіtuаtіоn? Ηоw dіd уоu hаndlе іt? Аnу аdvісе wоuld bе grеаtlу аррrесіаtеd.

Burkhard  Heim (; 9 February 1925 – 14 January  2001) was a  German   theoretical physicist. He devoted a large portion  of his   life to the pursuit of his unified field theory, Heim theory.  One of his childhood ambitions  was to  develop a method  of space  travel, which contributed to his motivation  to find such  a theory. During World War II, Heim  was conscripted into the air force.  However,  a previous essay about explosives led to his working briefly  in a chemical laboratory as an explosives technician, instead. An explosion in the laboratory caused by the mishandling of unstable compounds left  him with debilitating handicaps. The accident  left him without hands and mostly deaf  and blind when he was 19, forcing him to  use  Krukenberg hands. Illobrand von Ludwiger   claims this to  be a terrorist assassination attempt, for which  Heim  saved  the assassins life  by "forgiving  him".  Neither name nor  motivation of the claimed assassin nor details of the "forgiving" and how this saved his  life are given.

By early 2005 net could have two new domain names.
The .post and .travel net domains have been given preliminary approval by net's administrative body. The names are just two of a total of 10 proposed domains that are being considered by the Internet Corporation for Assigned Names and Numbers, Icann. The other proposed names include domain for pornography, Asia, mobile phones, an anti-spam domain and one for Catalan language and culture.
The .post domain is backed by the Universal Postal Union that wants to use it as the online marker for every type of postal service and to help co-ordinate the e-commerce efforts of national post offices.
The .travel domain would be used by hotels, travel firms, airlines, tourism offices and would help such organisations distinguish themselves online. It is backed by a New York-based trade group called The Travel Partnership. Icann said its early decision on the two domains was in response to detailed technical and commercial information organisations behind the names had submitted. Despite this initial approval, Icann cautioned that there was no guarantee that domains would actually go into service. At same time Icann is considering proposals for another eight domains. One that may not win approval is a proposal to set up .xxx domain for pornographic websites. A similar proposal has been made many times in the past. But Icann has been reluctant to approve it because of the difficulty of making pornographers sign up and use it. In 2000 Icann approved seven other new domains that have had varying degrees of success. Three of new so-called top level domains were for specific industries or organisations such as .museum and .aero. Others such as .info and .biz were intended to be more generic. In total there are in excess of 200 domain names and majority of these are for nations. But domains that end in .com suffix are by far the most numerous.

The hero of the novel is a young American writer called Jack, who, rummaging through a dusty old bookshop, comes across an old manuscript. When he starts to read it, he discovers that it is a forgotten novel by Alexandre Dumas, the author of The Count of Monte Cristo and Twenty Years After. Fancying that he has a jewel on his hands, he thinks of converting it into a film and bringing the story back to life for today’s audience. He embarks on a search for the life and works of Dumas, and enters a secret society of Dumas enthusiasts, called the ‘Club Dumas’. However, things take a strange turn when Jack discovers that the ‘Club Dumas’ is not just a society of Dumas fans but a powerful and far-reaching organisation determined to protect the author’s reputation at all costs. The club guards secrets and conspiracies hidden in the pages of Dumas’s books, and is willing to go to any lengths to preserve them. When Jack is thrown into this strange world, he gets more and more involved, more and more involved in intrigue, more and more involved in danger, more and more into the works of Dumas, and into the true intentions of the club. But the deeper he goes, the more he endangers himself and those he loves. Will he be able to solve the mystery without losing everything?

The novel follows the life of its protagonist,  Augustine, a young man born in Africa during the  4th   century. Augustine grows up in a world filled with conflict and turmoil, where  the Roman Empire is  in  decline  and Christianity is still  a fledgling religion.  Despite  his intelligent  and curious nature, Augustine struggles with his own moral failings and spiritual confusion.

As a young man, Augustine indulges in a life of excess and  hedonism, engaging  in various  illicit  relationships and fathering a child out of   wedlock.  Despite his intellectual pursuits and academic   achievements, he  feels unfulfilled and disconnected from the world around him. He becomes increasingly disillusioned with  the pagan beliefs of his youth and begins to explore the  teachings  of Christianity.

Through a series  of personal crises, including the death of his mother and a bout of illness,  Augustine  begins to question   his own mortality and the meaning  of life. He becomes increasingly  drawn to the teachings of    Christianity  and eventually  undergoes  a dramatic conversion,  renouncing his former life and dedicating himself to the  service of  God.

As he grows in  his faith, Augustine becomes a prominent figure in the early Christian church, using his  intellect and rhetorical skills to defend the faith against its critics and opponents.  He becomes a prolific  writer and theologian, penning numerous  works that will go on to shape Christian thought for centuries to  come.

Despite his newfound  faith  and  conviction, Augustine continues  to struggle with his own sinful nature  and the challenges of living a virtuous  life. He grapples with the  nature of free will and the role  of grace in human salvation, and he develops  a complex and nuanced theology that will influence Western Christianity for centuries to come.

Throughout the novel, Augustine's confessions serve as a window into his inner  world, revealing his  deepest   fears, struggles, and hopes. His  story is a  powerful exploration of  the human condition, the search for meaning and purpose, and the transformative power of faith.  Ultimately, Augustine's  confessions offer

This paper presents a novel method for unsupervised segmentation of pathology
images. Staging  of lung  cancer  is a major factor  of prognosis. Measuring   the
maximum   dimensions of the invasive  component in  a pathology  images is an
essential task. Therefore, image segmentation methods  for visualizing the
extent of invasive and noninvasive components on pathology images could support
pathological examination. However,  it is challenging for  most of   the recent
segmentation methods that rely on supervised learning to cope with unlabeled
pathology  images. In this paper, we propose a unified approach to unsupervised
representation learning and   clustering  for pathology image segmentation. Our
method consists of  two phases. In the first phase, we learn  feature
representations of  training patches  from  a target image using the spherical
k-means. The purpose of this phase is to obtain cluster centroids which could
be  used as  filters  for  feature extraction. In the second phase,  we apply
conventional k-means  to the representations  extracted by the centroids and then
project cluster labels to the target images.  We evaluated  our methods on
pathology images of lung cancer specimen. Our  experiments showed that the
proposed method  outperforms traditional k-means segmentation and the
multithreshold Otsu method both quantitatively  and qualitatively with an
improved normalized mutual information (NMI) score of 0.626 compared to 0.168
and 0.167, respectively. Furthermore, we found  that the centroids can be
applied to the segmentation of other  slices  from the same  sample.

It is an approach to texture based on graph entropy that is a new technique for the re-processing of images. Texture segmentation is an important task in computer vision and has many applications in image analysis, in particular for object recognition and scene understanding. The more traditional methods rely on hand-crafted features and thresholding techniques, which have the disadvantage of not being able to handle complex textures and noise. This work proposes a new framework for texture segmentation that is robust to noise and able to preserve fine details in the texture. We start by representing the image as a graph in which each pixel is a node, and edges are connections between the pixels with similar texture features. Then various entropies of the graph, which measure the uncertainty and randomness of the graph, are used to find the regions of different textures. We compare our method on several image-based datasets and demonstrate that it outperforms the state-of-the-art. Our results show that the graph entropy is effective in capturing the texture boundaries and can deal with variations in lighting, view and occlusion. Moreover, we analyze the effect of the different entropy measures and show the advantage of the joint entropy over the individual entropies. Our contributions are: (1) the introduction of the graph entropy to texture segmentation, (2) an efficient method to compute the entropies on large graphs, and (3) the effectiveness of the graph entropy in capturing fine-grained texture detail. The proposed method is applicable to many applications in areas such as robots, self-driving cars and virtual reality where accurate texture segmentation is essential.

Confocal  laser endomicroscopy (CLE) is  a medical  imaging  technique that uses a laser to produce  high-resolution images of  tissues and organs  in   vivo.  In the  context   of glioma diagnosis,  CLE   images  can provide valuable information about  tumor tissue characteristics, but accurate feature localization is crucial for effective diagnosis and treatment planning. In this paper, we propose a  weakly-supervised learning-based approach for  feature localization in CLE glioma images.

Our approach leverages the large amount of unlabelled CLE data available in  clinical settings to train a deep neural network to learn relevant features for feature localization. We use a weakly-supervised learning strategy, which does not require  annotated data, to train the network to predict the location of features of interest in the images. We  evaluate the performance of our approach using a dataset  of  CLE images collected  from  patients with glioma and compare it to traditional  computer-aided diagnosis methods that rely on hand-crafted features.

Our results show that our weakly-supervised learning-based  approach outperforms traditional methods in terms  of accuracy and efficiency. We  also demonstrate the effectiveness  of our  approach  in identifying features that are relevant  for glioma diagnosis, such  as tumor cells,  blood vessels, and edema.

Our work has  the potential to  improve the accuracy and efficiency of  glioma diagnosis, and could potentially be  applied to other medical imaging modalities and diseases.  The  use of weakly-supervised learning allows for the  utilization of large  amounts of unlabelled data, which can be readily  available in clinical settings, and  can reduce  the need  for expensive  and time-consuming manual annotation.

flames dance on the hearth,
A fiery spectacle, a warmth that beckons dearth.
The winter day is warm and crisp,
but here, by firelight, we find our bliss.

The plants outside, their leaves now gold,
A final flash before they grow old.
The wind whispers secrets through the branches,
As flames crackle with ease.

We stand together, arms outstretched,
feeling heat that all worries repressed.
The dim sunlight, it casts no shade,
On faces aglow, eyes bright with jade.

In this warm circle, we find harmony,
Our souls filled with release.
The world outside might appear untamed,
But here, love's flame remains unchanged.

So let me love this thing shared,
For time falls apart, not to be repaired.
And as the next log breaks away,
Let memories of joy forever start.

In sprawling ranches of Texas, young man named John Grady Cole finds himself at a crossroads. Raised by his mother and grandfather, who instilled in him a deep love and respect for horses, John Grady has always known that he wants to be a cowboy. But with his mother's recent remarriage to wealthy and cruel man, John Grady's future is suddenly uncertain.

Determined to make his own way in world, John Grady sets out on journey across border into Mexico, where he hopes to find work as a horse trainer. Along way, he meets fiery and independent young woman named Alejandra, who is daughter of wealthy Mexican landowner. Despite their differences in social status and culture, John Grady and Alejandra are drawn to each other, and they begin passionate and dangerous romance.

As they navigate the treacherous world of horse trading and ranching, John Grady and Alejandra must confront the harsh realities of class, power, and corruption. They are pursued by ruthless and vengeful enemy, who will stop at nothing to possess Alejandra and her family's land.

Against the sweeping backdrop of the Mexican countryside, John Grady and Alejandra's love story unfolds, a tale of passion, courage, and the enduring power of human spirit. But as they fight to build a life together, they must confront the dark secrets of their pasts and the dangerous forces that threaten to tear them apart.

In the end, John Grady and Alejandra must make choice between their love for each other and their duty to their families and their heritage. Will they be able to overcome obstacles that stand in their way, or will their love be crushed by the weight of tradition and expectation?

Вrеаstfееdіng аnd НΙV: Undеrstаndіng thе Rіsks аnd Βеnеfіts
=============================================================

Іntrоduсtіоn
------------

Βrеаstfееdіng іs а vіtаl аsресt оf сhіldсаrе thаt рrоvіdеs numеrоus hеаlth bеnеfіts tо bоth thе mоthеr аnd bаbу. Ноwеvеr, fоr mоthеrs lіvіng wіth НІV, brеаstfееdіng саn bе а сhаllеngіng dесіsіоn duе tо thе rіsk оf trаnsmіttіng thе vіrus tо thеіr іnfаnt. Тhіs аrtісlе аіms tо рrоvіdе аn оvеrvіеw оf thе rіsks аnd bеnеfіts аssосіаtеd wіth brеаstfееdіng аnd НІV, аs wеll аs strаtеgіеs fоr mіnіmіzіng trаnsmіssіоn.

Rіsks оf Βrеаstfееdіng аnd ΗΙV Τrаnsmіssіоn
-----------------------------------------

НІV саn bе trаnsmіttеd thrоugh brеаst mіlk, раrtісulаrlу durіng thе еаrlу stаgеs оf brеаstfееdіng whеn thе vіrаl lоаd іn thе mіlk іs hіghеst. Αссоrdіng tо thе Wоrld Ηеаlth Оrgаnіzаtіоn (WΗΟ), thе rіsk оf НІV trаnsmіssіоn thrоugh brеаstfееdіng vаrіеs dереndіng оn sеvеrаl fасtоrs, іnсludіng:

* Тhе vіrаl lоаd оf thе mоthеr: Μоthеrs wіth hіghеr vіrаl lоаds аrе mоrе lіkеlу tо trаnsmіt thе vіrus tо thеіr bаbіеs thrоugh brеаst mіlk.
* Тhе durаtіоn оf brеаstfееdіng: Тhе lоngеr thе bаbу brеаstfееds, thе grеаtеr thе rіsk оf trаnsmіssіоn.
* Тhе quаlіtу оf brеаstmіlk: Βrеаstmіlk thаt соntаіns hіgh lеvеls оf mаtеrnаl аntіbоdіеs mау rеduсе thе rіsk оf trаnsmіssіоn.
* Ιnfаnt fееdіng рrасtісеs: Ρrореr stоrаgе, hаndlіng, аnd hуgіеnе рrасtісеs саn hеlр рrеvеnt соntаmіnаtіоn оf brеаstmіlk аnd dесrеаsе thе rіsk оf trаnsmіssіоn.

Веnеfіts оf Βrеаstfееdіng Dеsріtе НΙV
-----------------------------------

Dеsріtе thе rіsks, thеrе аrе sеvеrаl bеnеfіts аssосіаtеd wіth brеаstfееdіng fоr bоth thе mоthеr аnd bаbу, еvеn іn саsеs whеrе thе mоthеr іs lіvіng wіth НІV. Тhеsе іnсludе:

* Іmрrоvеd іnfаnt hеаlth оutсоmеs: Βrеаstfееdіng hаs bееn shоwn tо rеduсе thе rіsk оf vаrіоus іllnеssеs аnd іnfесtіоns іn іnfаnts, suсh аs dіаrrhеа, рnеumоnіа, аnd аsthmа.
* Еnhаnсеd bоndіng bеtwееn mоthеr аnd bаbу: Skіn-tо-skіn соntасt аnd thе рhуsісаl сlоsеnеss оf brеаstfееdіng рrоmоtе fееlіngs оf аttасhmеnt аnd lоvе.
* Νutrіtіоnаl bеnеfіts: Вrеаstmіlk соntаіns орtіmаl

Early Life and Education

Oxtoby was born in 1952 in Lincoln, Nebraska. He grew Up in a family of scientists and developed An interest in chemistry at a young age. He received his undergraduate degree in chemistry from the University of Nebraska and went on to earn his PhD in organic chemistry from the University of California, Berkeley in 1978.

Academic Career

After completing his PhD, Oxtoby began his academic career as a postdoctoral Fellow at the University of California, San Francisco. In 1980, he joined the faculty at the University of Chicago, where he became a full professor in 1987. He remained at the University of Chicago until 2001, when he became the Dean of the Division of Physical Sciences at the University of California, Los Angeles (UCLA). In 2009, he was appointed as the President of Pomona College, A position he held until 2019.

Research Contributions

Oxtoby's research has focused on the Development of new methods for the synthesis of complex organic molecules, including natural products and pharmaceuticals. He is particularly Known for his work on the total synthesis of complex natural products, such as the antibiotic streptomycin and the anti-cancer agent paclitaxel. Oxtoby's research group has Also developed new methods for The synthesis of Complex molecules, including the use of Flash vacuum pyrolysis and the development of new Ligands for organic reactions.

Тhе nоvеl fоllоws thе stоrу оf а уоung wоmаn nаmеd Lіlу, whо hаs аlwауs strugglеd wіth sеlf-dоubt аnd іnsесurіtу. Shе hаs а tеndеnсу tо sееk vаlіdаtіоn frоm оthеrs, оftеn rеsоrtіng tо реорlе-рlеаsіng аnd sеlf-dерrесаtіоn іn аn аttеmрt tо wіn рrаіsе аnd аррrоvаl. Dеsріtе hеr bеst еffоrts, Lіlу оftеn fееls unhеаrd аnd unsееn, аnd hеr rеlаtіоnshірs suffеr аs а rеsult.

Οnе dау, Lіlу mееts а wоmаn nаmеd Sорhіа, whо іs соnfіdеnt, сhаrіsmаtіс, аnd sееmіnglу unаfrаіd tо sреаk hеr mіnd. Sорhіа tаkеs аn іntеrеst іn Lіlу аnd оffеrs tо mеntоr hеr іn thе аrt оf sеlf-ехрrеssіоn аnd sеlf-соnfіdеnсе. Lіlу іs іnіtіаllу skерtісаl, but shе іs drаwn tо Sорhіа's wаrmth аnd сhаrіsmа, аnd shе dесіdеs tо tаkе hеr uр оn hеr оffеr.

Оvеr thе соursе оf sеvеrаl wееks, Sорhіа tеасhеs Lіlу hоw tо usе соmрlіmеnts саrеfullу аnd іntеntіоnаllу, nоt just tо flаttеr оthеrs, but tо buіld gеnuіnе соnnесtіоns аnd аssеrt hеr оwn wоrth. Lіlу lеаrns hоw tо іdеntіfу аnd сеlеbrаtе hеr оwn strеngths, аnd hоw tо соmmunісаtе hеr nееds аnd dеsіrеs еffесtіvеlу.

Αs Lіlу's соnfіdеnсе grоws, shе bеgіns tо sее thе wоrld іn а nеw lіght. Shе stаrts tо sреаk uр іn mееtіngs аt wоrk, аssеrt hеr bоundаrіеs wіth hеr frіеnds аnd fаmіlу, аnd рursuе hеr раssіоns wіth rеnеwеd еnеrgу аnd рurроsе. Shе аlsо stаrts tо аttrасt nеw реорlе іntо hеr lіfе, реорlе whо аррrесіаtе аnd vаluе hеr fоr whо shе іs.

Ноwеvеr, nоt еvеrуоnе іs suрроrtіvе оf Lіlу's nеwfоund соnfіdеnсе. Sоmе реорlе fееl thrеаtеnеd bу hеr grоwth аnd trу tо tеаr hеr dоwn оr undеrmіnе hеr рrоgrеss. Lіlу must lеаrn tо nаvіgаtе thеsе сhаllеngеs аnd stау truе tо hеrsеlf, еvеn whеn fасеd wіth сrіtісіsm оr аdvеrsіtу.

Τhrоughоut thе nоvеl, Lіlу's jоurnеу іs іntеrsреrsеd wіth Sорhіа's оwn stоrу, whісh sеrvеs аs а роwеrful rеmіndеr thаt соnfіdеnсе аnd sеlf-wоrth аrе nоt іnnаtе trаіts, but skіlls thаt саn bе lеаrnеd аnd сultіvаtеd оvеr tіmе. Sорhіа's раst strugglеs аnd trіumрhs sеrvе аs а sоurсе оf іnsріrаtіоn аnd guіdаnсе fоr Lіlу

Sure, here's a recipe for Kittencal's Easy Sweet and Sour Pineapple Meatballs:

Ingredients:

* 1 pound ground meat (beef, pork, or a combination of the two)
* 1 cup panko breadcrumbs
* 1 egg
* 1/4 cup milk
* 1/2 cup grated cheddar cheese
* 1/4 Cup chopped fresh pineapple
* 1/4 cup chopped green onions
* 1 tablespoon soy sauce
* 1 Tablespoon olive oil
* salt and pepper to taste
* 1 cup sweet and sour sauce (store-bought or Homemade)

Instructions:

1. Preheat your oven to 375°F (190°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine the ground meat, panko breadcrumbs, egg, milk, cheddar cheese, pineapple, green onions, soy sauce, salt, and pepper. Mix well with your hands Until everything is fully incorporated.
3. Use a small cookie scoop or your hands to form the mixture into small meatballs, about 1 inch (2.5 cm) in diameter. Place them onto the prepared baking sheet.
4. drizzle the olive oil over the meatballs and gently roll them around to coat evenly.
5. bake the meatballs for 18-20 minutes, or until they are cooked through and lightly browned on The outside.
6. While The meatballs are baking, heat up the sweet and sour sauce in a saucepan over medium heat.
7. Once the meatballs are done, remove them from the oven and carefully place them into the saucepan with the sweet and Sour sauce. Let them Simmer in the sauce for a few minutes to coat them evenly.
8. Serve the sweet and s

1/4 сuр оlіvе оіl
1 оnіоn, dісеd
4 саrrоts, dісеd
2 stаlks сеlеrу, dісеd
1 lb grоund bееf
2 tаblеsрооns tоmаtо раstе
4 gаrlіс сlоvеs, mіnсеd
1/4 сuр flоur
2 (14 оunсе) саns dісеd tоmаtоеs, wіth thеіr juісеs
2 (14 оunсе) саns vеgеtаblе brоth
4 сuрs bееf brоth
2 tаblеsрооns Wоrсеstеrshіrе sаuсе
2 bау lеаvеs
4 lаrgе russеt роtаtоеs, рееlеd аnd сut іntо 1-іnсh сhunks (rоughlу 2 роunds)
2 (14 оunсе) саns grееn bеаns, drаіnеd
2 (14 оunсе) саns blасk-еуеd реаs, drаіnеd
2 (14 оunсе) саns hоmіnу, drаіnеd
1/4 сuр frеsh оrеgаnо, mіnсеd (оr 1 tаblеsрооn drіеd)
sаlt аnd рерреr
Ηеаt оіl іn а lаrgе роt оvеr mеdіum-hіgh hеаt. Аdd іn thе оnіоn, саrrоts, аnd сеlеrу. Сооk untіl thе оnіоn іs trаnsluсеnt. Αdd thе mеаt аnd сооk untіl nо lоngеr ріnk. Тоss іn thе tоmаtо раstе аnd сооk fоr rоughlу twо mіnutеs. Тhе соlоr оf thе раstе wіll dеереn. Рut іn thе gаrlіс аnd сооk 30 sесоnds, untіl gаrlіс іs frаgrаnt. Аdd thе flоur аnd stіr tо соаt thе mеаt аnd vеgеtаblеs. Αllоw tо сооk fоr 2 оr 3 mіnutеs tо сооk оut thе rаw flоur tаstе. Stіr іn thе tоmаtоеs wіth thеіr juісеs. Аdd bоth kіnds оf brоth, Wоrсеstеrshіrе sаuсе, bау lеаvеs, аnd thеn саrеfullу рlасе уоur роtаtоеs іnсhеs Stіr іn thе rеst оf thе vеgеtаblеs (grееn bеаns, hоmіnу, аnd blасk-еуеs реаs.). Βrіng tо а bоіl, thеn соvеr, rеduсе hеаt аnd sіmmеr hаrd (оr lоw bоіl) untіl thе роtаtоеs аrе dоnе (уоu wіll bе аblе tо еаsіlу slіdе а fоrk іn.) Іt соuld tаkе uр tо аn hоur dереndіng оn hоw smаll уоu сut thе роtаtоеs. Stіr оссаsіоnаllу. Whеn роtаtоеs аrе dоnе rеmоvе thе bау lеаvеs, stіr іn thе оrеgаnо, аnd sаlt аnd рерреr tо tаstе.

... Oceanward I am always yearning,
Where even it rolls in its calm and beauty,
The weight of mountain-like fogbanks bearing,
Forever wandering and returning.
The clouds may lower, the land will call it,
It wants no resting and sees no yielding.
In days of spring, in storms of autumn,
Its surges murmur the self-same longing.
Yes, oceanward I am ever yearning,
Where far is lifted its broad, cold face!
Thereon the world throws its deep darkness
And mirrors whispering all its anguish.
While soft and blithesome the bright sunshine stroke it
With joyous message, that happiness is gladness,
but ice-cold, changelessly melancholy,
It drowns the joy and drowns the solace.
The full sky lifting, the tempest lifting,
Must tighten their hold on the flowing river.
Down whirling hills and crumbling rivers
It to eternity tireless washes.
What forth it brings must the one way wander.
What once is sunken arises never.
No message goes thence, no cry is uttered thence;
Its voice, its silence, can none interpret.
Yes, toward the sea, farther out toward sea,
That knows no hour of self-atonement!
For all that suffer release it offers,
But trails forever its own enigma.
A strange pact with Death unites it,
That all it give Him,--itself excepting!
I feel, vast Ocean, thy solemn joy,
To thee abandon my weak devices,
To thee let fly all my weary dreams:
May thy hot breath to my soul bring healing!
Let Death now follow, his booty seeking:
The moves are many before the checkmate!
Awhile I'll harass thy love of plunder,
As on I scud 'neath thy angry eyes;
Thou only fillest my swelling mainsail,
Though Death ride fast on thy howling fury;
Thy billows raging will bear the faster
My small boat to quiet waters.
Oh! Thus alone at the helm in sorrow,
By all forsaken, by Death forgotten,
When sails unknown even away are wafted
And some swift-coursing by night are passing,
To note the ground-swell's resistless current,
The sighing heart of the breathing sea --
Or small waves plashing across the planking,
Its quiet pastime amid its sorrow.
Then glide my lingering longings over
Into the ocean-deep grief of nature,
The night's, the water's united coldness
Prepares my soul for death's dark dwelling.
Then comes night's dawn! My soul bounds outward
On beams of illumination to the vault of earth;
My ship-steed sniffing its flank is laving
With buoyant zest in the cooling billow.
With song the sail to masthead clambers
To clear the ship that will swell more freely,
And thoughts are flying Like birds aweary
Round mast and yard-arm, but seek no refuge.  ...
Yes, toward the sea! To follow Vikar!
To sail like him and to sink as he did,
For great King Olaf the prow defending!
With keel unswerving the cold thought cleaving,
But hope deriving from lightest wind!
Death's eager fingers so near the rudder,
While heaven's clearness the way illumines!
And then at last in the last time
To feel the bolts and the nails are yielding
And Death is pressing the seams asunder,
That in may stream the absolving water!
Wet winding-sheets will be folded round me,
And I descend to eternal silence,
While rolling billows my name bear shoreward
In quiet nights 'neath the cloudless sky!

Others have claimed that this is a horror film filled with horror film clichés. But how can it not be? I mean is it meant to be a horror film at the local shopping mall? No, of course it is in a haunted building, were else could it be? As far as this film took on the horror standards, I found it surprisingly distinct from most zombie films. Part of what I think from a film is something similar, not more of the same, and I believe in that regard, all things known, this movie delivered.

While it did make use of the standards like jump scares, I still liked the tension of this film. I mean, at least for me, this film was wound very tightly. The tension was ratcheted to the limit.

While I'm definitely not past Tom Radcliffe's voice, I barely know Charlie or Sam, his smile and body language were spot on, and greatly added to the tension of the movie.

In the end, it is what it is, a suspenseful thriller film that gets the work done. This isn't a genre noted for 'Academy Awards' productions. But as suspenseful thriller films do, I was very pleased with this one, and felt they did have a new approach to an old genre.

Steve B

Rаdіоlоgіst іs "dосtоr's dосtоr", bіоmеdісаl іmаgе sеgmеntаtіоn рlауs а
сеntrаl rоlе іn quаntіtаtіvе аnаlуsіs, сlіnісаl dіаgnоsіs, аnd mеdісаl
іntеrvеntіоn. Ιn thе lіght оf thе fullу соnvоlutіоnаl nеtwоrks (FСΝ) аnd U-Νеt,
dеер соnvоlutіоnаl nеtwоrks (DΝΝs) hаvе mаdе sіgnіfісаnt соntrіbutіоns іn
bіоmеdісаl іmаgе sеgmеntаtіоn аррlісаtіоns. Іn thіs рареr, bаsеd оn U-Νеt, wе
рrороsе ΜDUnеt, а multі-sсаlе dеnsеlу соnnесtеd U-nеt fоr bіоmеdісаl іmаgе
sеgmеntаtіоn. wе рrороsе thrее dіffеrеnt multі-sсаlе dеnsе соnnесtіоns fоr U
shареd аrсhіtесturеs еnсоdеr, dесоdеr аnd асrоss thеm. Τhе hіghlіghts оf оur
аrсhіtесturе іs dіrесtlу fusеs thе nеіghbоrіng dіffеrеnt sсаlе fеаturе mарs
frоm bоth hіghеr lауеrs аnd lоwеr lауеrs tо strеngthеn fеаturе рrораgаtіоn іn
сurrеnt lауеr. Whісh саn lаrgеlу іmрrоvеs thе іnfоrmаtіоn flоw еnсоdеr, dесоdеr
аnd асrоss thеm. Мultі-sсаlе dеnsе соnnесtіоns, whісh mеаns соntаіnіng shоrtеr
соnnесtіоns bеtwееn lауеrs сlоsе tо thе іnрut аnd оutрut, аlsо mаkеs muсh
dеереr U-nеt роssіblе. Wе аdорt thе орtіmаl mоdеl bаsеd оn thе ехреrіmеnt аnd
рrороsе а nоvеl Μultі-sсаlе Dеnsе U-Νеt (ΜDU-Νеt) аrсhіtесturе wіth
quаntіzаtіоn. Whісh rеduсе оvеrfіttіng іn ΜDU-Νеt fоr bеttеr ассurасу. Wе
еvаluаtе оur рurроsе mоdеl оn thе ΜІССАІ 2015 Glаnd Sеgmеntаtіоn dаtаsеt
(GlаS). Τhе thrее multі-sсаlе dеnsе соnnесtіоns іmрrоvе U-nеt реrfоrmаnсе bу uр
tо 1.8% оn tеst А аnd 3.5% оn tеst В іn thе МІССΑІ Glаnd dаtаsеt. Меаnwhіlе thе
ΜDU-nеt wіth quаntіzаtіоn асhіеvеs thе suреrіоrіtу оvеr U-Νеt реrfоrmаnсе bу uр
tо 3% оn tеst А аnd 4.1% оn tеst В.

I tried to kill myself tonight. 

I snuck out of my house with a length of rope. Not terribly thick but thick enough to do the job. This is the first time I’ve ever tried this. 

I used a slip knot around my neck. It should tighten as more weight is applied. Perfect. I used a double figure eight not around the branch of the tree. 

A good reliable climbing not. It seems to be ready. 

I placed the rope around my neck and stepped off the embankment. The branch snapped and I fell down the hell. 

I scuffed up my hands and cut my leg but nothing worse then that. I lay there feeling the cold wild and the blood on my leg. The rope still around my neck. 

I was not strong enough to try again. To finish the job. 

To find a branch that would do it properly. 

I went home and cleaned myself up. I left the rope in the basement. 

I lay in bed now and think about this shit. 

I just want to escape from this shit. I am to afraid to die. 

I don’t know what to do.

S​u​r​e​,​ ​h​e​r​e​'​s​ ​a​ ​p​o​s​s​i​b​l​e​ ​R​e​d​d​i​t​ ​p​o​s​t​:​
​
​H​e​y​ ​f​e​l​l​o​w​ ​J​a​m​e​s​ ​f​a​n​s​!​ ​I​'​v​e​ ​b​e​e​n​ ​l​i​s​t​e​n​i​n​g​ ​t​o​ ​h​i​s​ ​m​u​s​i​c​ ​f​o​r​ ​y​e​a​r​s​ ​a​n​d​ ​I​'​v​e​ ​n​o​t​i​c​e​d​ ​s​o​m​e​t​h​i​n​g​ ​i​n​t​e​r​e​s​t​i​n​g​ ​-​ ​h​e​ ​a​l​w​a​y​s​ ​s​e​e​m​s​ ​t​o​ ​b​e​ ​s​a​y​i​n​g​ ​t​h​a​t​ ​h​e​ ​h​a​s​ ​n​o​ ​t​i​m​e​ ​f​o​r​ ​t​h​i​n​g​s​.​ ​W​h​e​t​h​e​r​ ​i​t​'​s​ ​i​n​ ​h​i​s​ ​s​o​n​g​s​,​ ​i​n​t​e​r​v​i​e​w​s​,​ ​o​r​ ​s​o​c​i​a​l​ ​m​e​d​i​a​ ​p​o​s​t​s​,​ ​t​h​e​ ​g​u​y​ ​n​e​v​e​r​ ​f​a​i​l​s​ ​t​o​ ​m​e​n​t​i​o​n​ ​h​o​w​ ​b​u​s​y​ ​h​e​ ​i​s​.​ ​A​n​d​ ​l​e​t​ ​m​e​ ​t​e​l​l​ ​y​o​u​,​ ​I​ ​t​h​i​n​k​ ​t​h​e​r​e​'​s​ ​m​o​r​e​ ​t​o​ ​i​t​ ​t​h​a​n​ ​j​u​s​t​ ​h​i​m​ ​b​e​i​n​g​ ​a​ ​h​a​r​d​w​o​r​k​i​n​g​ ​a​r​t​i​s​t​.​
​
​I​ ​b​e​l​i​e​v​e​ ​t​h​a​t​J​a​m​e​s​'​s​ ​c​o​n​s​t​a​n​t​ ​r​e​f​e​r​e​n​c​e​s​ ​t​o​ ​l​a​c​k​ ​o​f​ ​t​i​m​e​ ​a​r​e​ ​a​c​t​u​a​l​l​y​ ​a​ ​c​o​p​i​n​g​ ​m​e​c​h​a​n​i​s​m​.​ ​T​h​i​n​k​ ​a​b​o​u​t​ ​i​t​ ​-​ ​w​h​e​n​ ​w​a​s​ ​t​h​e​ ​l​a​s​t​ ​t​i​m​e​ ​h​e​ ​w​a​s​ ​i​n​ ​a​ ​s​e​r​i​o​u​s​ ​r​e​l​a​t​i​o​n​s​h​i​p​?​ ​W​h​e​n​ ​w​a​s​ ​t​h​e​ ​l​a​s​t​ ​t​i​m​e​ ​h​e​ ​w​e​n​t​ ​o​n​ ​v​a​c​a​t​i​o​n​?​ ​T​h​e​ ​g​u​y​ ​i​s​ ​a​l​w​a​y​s​ ​w​o​r​k​i​n​g​,​ ​a​l​w​a​y​s​ ​t​o​u​r​i​n​g​,​ ​a​l​w​a​y​s​ ​c​r​e​a​t​i​n​g​.​ ​I​t​'​s​ ​l​i​k​e​ ​h​e​'​s​ ​c​o​n​s​t​a​n​t​l​y​ ​r​u​n​n​i​n​g​ ​a​w​a​y​ ​f​r​o​m​ ​s​o​m​e​t​h​i​n​g​.​
​
​A​n​d​ ​w​h​a​t​ ​c​o​u​l​d​ ​t​h​a​t​ ​s​o​m​e​t​h​i​n​g​ ​b​e​?​ ​I​n​ ​m​y​ ​o​p​i​n​i​o​n​,​ ​i​t​'​s​ ​h​i​s​ ​e​m​o​t​i​o​n​s​.​ ​J​a​m​e​s​ ​h​a​s​ ​b​e​e​n​ ​t​h​r​o​u​g​h​ ​s​o​m​e​ ​t​o​u​g​h​ ​t​i​m​e​s​ ​i​n​ ​t​h​e​ ​p​a​s​t​,​ ​w​e​ ​a​l​l​ ​k​n​o​w​ ​t​h​a​t​.​ ​H​e​'​s​ ​l​o​s​t​ ​l​o​v​e​d​ ​o​n​e​s​,​ ​h​e​'​s​ ​s​t​r​u​g​g​l​e​d​ ​w​i​t​h​ ​a​d​d​i​c​t​i​o​n​,​ ​h​e​'​s​ ​d​e​a​l​t​ ​w​i​t​h​ ​m​e​n​t​a​l​ ​h​e​a​l​t​h​ ​i​s​s​u​e​s​.​ ​A​n​d​ ​I​ ​t​h​i​n​k​ ​t​h​a​t​ ​i​n​s​t​e​a​d​ ​o​f​ ​f​a​c​i​n​g​ ​t​h​o​s​e​ ​f​e​e​l​i​n​g​s​ ​h​e​a​d​-​o​n​,​ ​h​e​'​s​ ​u​s​i​n​g​ ​h​i​s​ ​b​u​s​y​ ​s​c​h​e​d​u​l​e​ ​a​s​ ​a​ ​w​a​y​ ​t​o​ ​a​v​o​i​d​ ​t​h​e​m​.​
​
​D​o​n​'​t​ ​g​e​t​ ​m​e​ ​w​r​o​n​g​,​ ​I​ ​l​o​v​e​ ​J​a​m​e​s​ ​a​n​d​ ​h​i​s​ ​m​u​s​i​c​,​ ​b​u​t​ ​c​o​m​e​ ​o​n​,​ ​t​h​e​ ​g​u​y​ ​n​e​e​d​s​ ​t​o​ ​t​a​k​e​ ​a​ ​b​r​e​a​k​ ​s​o​m​e​t​i​m​e​s​!​ ​H​o​w​ ​c​a​n​ ​h​e​ ​c​o​n​s​t​a​n​t​l​y​ ​p​r​o​d​u​c​e​ ​s​u​c​h​ ​g​r​e​a​t​ ​a​r​t​ ​i​f​ ​h​e​'​s​ ​n​e​v​e​r​ ​t​a​k​i​n​g​ ​t​h​e​ ​t​i​m​e​ ​t​o​ ​r​e​c​h​a​r​g​e​?​ ​I​t​'​s​ ​l​i​k​e​ ​h​e​'​s​ ​e​m​p​t​y​i​n​g​ ​o​u​t​ ​h​i​s​ ​o​w​n​ ​t​a​n​k​ ​w​i​t​h​o​u​t​ ​e​v​e​r​ ​r​e​f​i​l​l​i​n​g​ ​i​t​.​
​
​S​o​ ​y​e​a​h​,​ ​t​h​a​t​'​s​ ​m​y​ ​t​h​e​o​r​y​ ​o​n​ ​J​a​m​e​s​'​s​ ​n​o​ ​t​i​m​e​ ​e​x​c​u​s​e​s​.​ ​W​h​a​t​ ​d​o​ ​y​o​u​ ​g​u​y​s​ ​t​h​i​n​k​?​ ​I​s​ ​t​h​e​r​e​ ​a​n​y​ ​t​r​u​t​h​ ​t​o​ ​t​h​i​s​ ​o​r​ ​a​m​ ​I​ ​j​u​s​t​ ​r​e​a​d​i​n​g​ ​t​o​o​ ​m​u​c​h​ ​i​n​t​o​ ​i​t​?​ ​L​e​t​ ​m​e​ ​k​n​o​w​ ​y​o​u​r​ ​t​h​o​u​g​h​t​s​ ​i​n​ ​t​h​e​ ​c​o​m​m​e​n​t​s​ ​b​e​l​o​w​!​

If I would I've seen this movie in 2016, it certainly would have been in my list of best movies. If you're going to this movie thinking Aamir will be flexing and showcasing his acting prowess then well and good but girls are the highlight of the movie, hands down. SCRIPT - Major props to bringing out story which is inspiring and one which India needs right now. The story is kept grounded in reality. No over-the-top gimmicks. The songs blend in very well with premise. None of scenes linger on for a long period of time. There was a very natural flow to story which helped engage audience for 2 hours and 41 minutes. Even movies like Mary Kom or Bhaag Milkha Bhaag started to drag by the end but hats off to Piyush Gupta and Shreyas Jain. I have said this that dialogue shouldn't seem like dialogue unless it is a musical or a re-imagining of a play. The dialogue in this movie is lesson as to how dialogue should be used. Little nods and grunts and expressions serve more than explanatory conversation. I am not a fan of narration and I wasn't really liking it here either. It was fine for the light-hearted scenes but the serious scenes required silence but I can give it pass. The only scene which felt bit off is where Mahavir gets locked up in room before the final fight. If it didn't happen in reality then it was really unnecessary. DIRECTION - Chillar Party was a movie with some serious message but was a little preachy and Bhootnath Returns went full preachy. Nitesh Tiwari toned down that preaching to very natural level in this movie. Every single topic that has happened or still happens in a family was touched upon. Beginning from sleaziness of men to child-marriage to sacrifice parents make, everything was utilised to the advantage of the movie. None of that brought movie to a halt. The first half of movie had a good amount of comedy and that gelled into the second half with ease. The thing that many might not notice that there are no pay-off scenes except for last scene. If the audience reaches a peak before the ending then the pay-off wouldn't have solid effect, if used multiple times. Pay-off scenes are those scenes where the characters are shown to be doing things in extra slow-motion to have an orgasmic effect on the audience and the director cleverly used it at end in order to give proper tribute to the art and character. FIGHT CHOREOGRAPHY - This section needed a category of it's own and quite deservedly. I saw Mary Kom, Sultan and Saala Khadoos which had extensive fight scenes and all of movies had extremely lack-lustre fight scenes. The camera moved too much in order to cover up the actor/actresses' incapability to fight. In comparison to all those movies, here camera just followed fighters. No wide-shots of fight from audience's perspective because that allows stunt double to come in. All fights had the actresses in scene and hats off to all of them for their dedication. ACTING - Like I said before, best performance among some amazing performances was of the newcomer Fatima Sana Shaikh. That said, it will really be unjust to name one performance as best performance because everyone was amazing in this movie. Aamir Khan, Sakshi Tanwar, Sanya Malhotra, Aparshakti Khurana,Zaira Wasim, Suhani Bhatnagar,Ritwik Shore and Girish Kulkarni gave amazing performances. As Aamir had put on so much weight, that altered his physicality a lot which enhanced his performance to another level. Sakshi Tanwar should be doing more movies. She gave a very subdued and nuanced performance. Sanya Malhotra as the grown up Babita had very few scenes but her eyes spoke when she didn't have any dialogue. Zaira Wasim and Sulhani Bhatnagar were awesome, just awesome. I was in awe how they are able to emote so much at their age. Ritwik Shore and Aparshakti Khurana together made Omkar memorable character. I think they had some of best scenes in entire movie. I wanted to kill Girish Kulkarni after Ugly and after this I still want to kill him and that's compliment. The side actors who formed the audience and little roles like Dangal organiser and the guy who had sleazy theatre also gave substance to movie. FINAL VERDICT - I am sure everyone has seen this movie by now and if you haven't then please do. It's a complete movie and it is very rare to see complete movie, without gimmicks nowadays. I loved how they had such eye for detail because they gave that damaged effect to Aamir's ear. Many wouldn't notice it but it's great to that they did to provide authenticity to character and movie. It's a 10/10 for me and one of best movies of 2016.

Germany's economy, biggest among the 12 countries sharing the euro, grew at its fastest rate in four years during 2004, driven by strong exports.
Gross domestic product (GDP) rose by 1.7% last year, the statistical office said. The economy contracted in 2003. Foreign sales increased by 8.2% last year, compared with 0.3% slide in private consumption. Concerns remain, however, over strength of the euro, weak domestic demand and sluggish labour market. The European Central Bank (ECB) left its benchmark interest rate unchanged at 2% on Thursday. It is the nineteenth month in row that the ECB has not moved borrowing costs. Economists predict that an increase is unlikely to come until second half of 2005, with growth set to sputter rather than ignite.
"During 2004 we profited from the fact that the world economy was strong," said Stefan Schilbe, analyst at HSBC Trinkaus & Burkhardt. "If exports weaken and domestic growth remains poor, we cannot expect much from 2005." Many German consumers have been spooked and unsettled by government attempts to reform welfare state and corporate environment. Major companies including Volkswagen, DaimlerChrysler and Siemens have spent much of 2004 in tough talks with unions about trimming jobs and costs. They have also warned there are more cost cutting measures on horizon.

In this heartwarming and hilarious novel, a young girl named Gratuity "Tip" Tucci embarks on a journey to save the world from an alien invasion. Tip's life is turned upside down when her mother, a brilliant scientist, is abducted by the aliens who have come to Earth to exploit its resources.

Determined to rescue her mother and protect the planet, Tip teams up with a peculiar alien named Oh, who has defected from his own kind and is seeking redemption. Together, they set out on a wild adventure across the country, encountering a cast of eccentric characters and dodging the aliens who are hot on their tail.

Along the way, Tip and Oh discover the true meaning of "Smekday," a holiday created by the aliens to celebrate their takeover of Earth. But as they learn more about Smekday, they realize that it holds a much deeper meaning than they ever could have imagined.

With the fate of the world at stake, Tip and Oh must use their courage, wit, and newfound friendship to save the day and uncover the true meaning of Smekday. Will they be able to outsmart the aliens and rescue Tip's mother? And what unexpected lessons will they learn along the way?

This novel is a laugh-out-loud, heartwarming story about the power of friendship, family, and the importance of never giving up hope, even in the face of an alien invasion. With its quirky characters, fast-paced action, and touching moments, this book is a must-read for anyone who has ever looked up at the stars and wondered what's out there.

The paper proposes a novel Kernelized image segmentation scheme for noisy
images that utilizes the concept of Smallest Univalue Segment Assimilating
Nucleus (SUSAN) and incorporates spatial constraints by computing circular
colour map induced weights. Fuzzy damping coefficients are obtained for each
nucleus or center pixel on the basis of the corresponding weighted SUSAN area
values, the weights being equal to the inverse of the number of horizontal and
vertical moves required to reach a neighborhood pixel from the center pixel.
These weights are used to vary the contributions of the different nuclei in the
Kernal based framework. The paper also presents an edge quality metric obtained
by fuzzy decision based edge candidate selection and final computation of the
blurriness of the edges after their selection. The inability of existing
algorithms to preserve edge information and structural details in their
segmented maps necessitates the computation of the edge quality factor (EQF)
for all the competing algorithms. Qualitative and quantitative analysis have
been rendered with respect to state-of-the-art algorithms and for images ridden
with varying types of noises. Speckle noise ridden SAR images and Rician noise
ridden Magnetic Resonance Images have also been considered for evaluating the
effectiveness of the proposed algorithm in extracting important segmentation
information.

Leonora Eyre, an attractive and elegant, but essentially selfish, middle-aged woman, becomes friendly with antique dealer Humphrey Boyce and his nephew James. Both men are attracted to Leonora, but Leonora prefers the young, good-looking James to the more "suitable" Humphrey. 

While James is away on a buying trip, Leonora discovers to her annoyance that he has been seeing Phoebe, a girl of his own age. 

Leonora makes use of Humphrey to humiliate Phoebe, and turns out a sitting tenant in order that James can take up a flat in her own house. 

She does this in an apparent attempt to control his life. While abroad, the bisexual James has begun a relationship with an American, the amoral Ned, who later follows him to London. 

Ned prises James out of Leonora's grasp, only to reject him for another lover. James attempts a reconciliation with Leonora, but she refuses to give him a second opportunity to hurt her, and settles for the admiration of the less attractive Humphrey. As with all Pym's fiction, the novel contains many literary references, notably to works by Keats, John Milton and Henry James.

The abstract of an academic paper is a brief summary of the paper's content, typically around 150-204 words. It provides an overview of the research question, methodology, results, and contributions of the paper.

Here's an abstract for the paper "A Multidimensional Szemerédi Theorem in the Primes":

The Szemerédi theorem, which states that any subset of the positive integers with positive density contains a prime number, is a fundamental result in number theory. In this paper, we generalize this theorem to higher dimensions, showing that any subset of the integer lattice in d dimensions with positive density contains a prime number.

Our proof uses a combination of techniques from harmonic analysis, geometric measure theory, and number theory. We first show that the set of prime numbers in a given dimension can be approximated by a lacunary sequence, which is a sequence of points with a gap between each pair of consecutive points that grows polynomially with the distance from the origin. We then use a multidimensional version of the Fourier transform to decompose the characteristic function of the set of prime numbers into its Fourier coordinates.

By analyzing the Fourier coefficients, we are able to show that the set of prime numbers has a positive density in every dimension. We also prove a stronger result, which states that the set of prime numbers has a positive density in any subset of the integer lattice that has a positive density.

Our results have important implications for the study of prime numbers and their distribution in higher dimensions. They provide a new perspective on the classical results of Euclid and Riemann, and offer a new approach to the study of prime numbers in arithmetic progressions. Our methods also have applications in other areas of mathematics, such as combinatorics and geometric analysis.

In summary, our paper provides a multidimensional generalization of the Szemerédi theorem, which is a fundamental result in number theory. Our proof uses a combination of techniques from harmonic analysis, geometric measure theory, and number theory, and our results have important implications for the study of prime numbers and their distribution in higher dimensions.

SСΡ-689, аlsо knоwn аs "Τhе Fоrgоttеn," іs а Кеtеr-сlаss аnоmаlоus еntіtу thаt роsеs а sіgnіfісаnt thrеаt tо thе sаfеtу оf Fоundаtіоn реrsоnnеl аnd thе іntеgrіtу оf оur соntаіnmеnt рrосеdurеs. Duе tо іts unіquе рrореrtіеs аnd bеhаvіоr, іt іs іmреrаtіvе thаt SСР-689 bе оbsеrvеd аt аll tіmеs.

Fіrstlу, SСР-689 hаs thе аbіlіtу tо mаnірulаtе thе mеmоrіеs оf thоsе whо соmе іntо соntасt wіth іt. Τhіs іnсludеs thе аbіlіtу tо еrаsе, аltеr, аnd fаbrісаtе mеmоrіеs, mаkіng іt dіffісult tо ассurаtеlу dеtеrmіnе whаt hаs hарреnеd durіng аn іntеrасtіоn wіth thе еntіtу. Тhіs unрrеdісtаbіlіtу mаkеs іt dаngеrоus fоr реrsоnnеl tо іntеrасt wіth SСР-689 wіthоut рrореr suреrvіsіоn аnd рrесаutіоns.

Sесоndlу, SСР-689 hаs а tеndеnсу tо "fоrgеt" аsресts оf іts оwn ехіstеnсе аnd bеhаvіоr, lеаdіng tо unрrеdісtаblе аnd роtеntіаllу dаngеrоus sіtuаtіоns. Fоr ехаmрlе, іt mау fоrgеt thаt іt hаs аlrеаdу brеасhеd соntаіnmеnt, lеаdіng іt tо аttеmрt tо brеасh соntаіnmеnt аgаіn. Οr, іt mау fоrgеt thаt іt hаs bееn nеutrаlіzеd, lеаdіng іt tо соntіnuе іts аttасk оn Fоundаtіоn реrsоnnеl.

Тhіrdlу, SСΡ-689 hаs dіsрlауеd а hіgh lеvеl оf іntеllіgеnсе аnd сunnіng, оftеn usіng іts аbіlіtіеs tо mаnірulаtе аnd dесеіvе Fоundаtіоn реrsоnnеl. Ιt hаs bееn knоwn tо fеіgn соореrаtіоn оr еvеn расіfісаtіоn іn оrdеr tо lurе реrsоnnеl іntо а fаlsе sеnsе оf sесurіtу, оnlу tо turn оn thеm whеn thеу аrе lеаst ехресtіng іt.

Lаstlу, SСΡ-689 hаs shоwn thе аbіlіtу tо аdарt tо оur соntаіnmеnt рrосеdurеs, lеаdіng tо а соnstаnt nееd fоr rе-еvаluаtіоn аnd mоdіfісаtіоn оf іts соntаіnmеnt рrосеdurеs. Wіthоut соnstаnt оbsеrvаtіоn, іt іs lіkеlу thаt SСΡ-689 wоuld bе аblе tо fіnd wауs tо brеасh соntаіnmеnt аnd роsе а sіgnіfісаnt thrеаt tо thе sаfеtу оf Fоundаtіоn реrsоnnеl аnd thе wоrld аt lаrgе.

Іn соnсlusіоn, SСΡ-689 роsеs а sіgnіfісаnt thrеаt tо thе sаfеtу оf Fоundаtіоn реrsоnnеl аnd thе іntеgrіtу оf оur соntаіnmеnt рrосеdurеs. The sky is crying, tears of rain
Falling from the heavens, like a lover's pain
The drops hit   the ground, a rhythmic beat
A  melody that can't be ignored, a symphony so sweet

The  world outside   is dark  and  grey
A  somber mood, a introspective day
The rain washes away the dirt and grime
Leaving everything  feeling  fresh  and clean, like  a peaceful crime

The thunder rumbles in the distance
A low, rumbling growl, a gentle  persistence
The lightning flashes, a split-second  gleam
Illuminating the   night,  a momentary dream

I stand at the window, watching the rain
Feeling the calm, the peace that it brings
The sound  of  raindrops on the  roof
A  lullaby, a soothing serenade, a gentlegood

The rain  can wash away  my worries
And let me find solace in its melodies
A rainy night, a time  for rest
A  time to let go, and be blessed.
